name: JellyTag Fork
overview: JellyTag with VFQ/VFF/VFI French variant flag support
description: JellyTag automatically overlays quality badges on media posters and thumbnails. This fork adds support for VFQ (Canadian French), VFF/VFI (French) audio track detection with distinct flags.

versions.changelog: Add VFQ/VFF/VFI French variant flag detection - VFQ shows Canadian flag (FR-QC), VFF/VFI shows French flag (FR)
